step_rationale: F1+2 is a direct product of Factor Xa activation of prothrombin; anchoring marker of thrombin generation.
mechanism: Prothrombin fragment 1+2 is released during tissue-factor-triggered coagulation, indicating thrombin generation during coronary thrombosis.
